name: Phi-1.5 Instruct
notes: Very strong for its size; especially good at coding logic, math reasoning, and structured answers. Feels more capable than typical 1B models in reasoning tasks.

name: Qwen 1.5 0.5B Instruct
notes: Best general-purpose sub-1B model. Good instruction following and decent reasoning, but weaker deep logic compared to Phi-1.5 or larger models.

name: Qwen 2 0.5B Instruct
notes: Improved instruction following over Qwen 1.5. More consistent answers, better formatting, and slightly better reasoning stability.

name: SmolLM 360M Instruct
notes: Lightweight and fast. Handles simple prompts well but struggles with multi-step reasoning or complex tasks.

name: SmolLM 135M Instruct
notes: Very small experimental model. Suitable only for basic text generation or testing pipelines, not real assistant use.
